llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Reports of upcoming ₹2,500 crore Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) for capital expenditure and growth plans, and to meet SEBI's minimum public shareholding norms. Share price jumped to an all-time high.

Despite weak Q4 FY26 results with a sharp fall in net profit and revenue slip, Nuvama Institutional Equities and ICICI Securities maintained 'Buy' ratings, citing strong order backlog, O&M portfolio, attractive valuation, and potential value creation from future growth opportunities.
Share price slumped over 8% after Q4 results; technical analysis indicates a weakening technical structure, with potential to drift towards ₹75 and immediate resistance around ₹90.
Reported highest-ever quarterly revenue of ₹11,173 crore (61% YoY jump), best-ever Q4 iron ore production and sales, and a 35% increase in Q4 PAT. Full-year FY26 PAT rose 11%.
Secured new orders totalling ₹2,002 crore across Power Transmission & Distribution, Buildings & Factories, and Railways business verticals.
Despite new order announcement, shares traded sharply lower on the NSE, closing down 1.68%, indicating selling pressure.
Reliance Jio, a subsidiary, crossed 200 million 5G subscribers, indicating strong market penetration and positioning in the rapidly growing Indian gaming and digital advertising market.

Reliance Jio, a subsidiary, crossed 200 million 5G subscribers, indicating strong market penetration and positioning in the rapidly growing Indian gaming and digital advertising market.
Secured new orders totalling ₹2,002 crore across Power Transmission & Distribution, Buildings & Factories, and Railways business verticals.

Despite weak Q4 FY26 results with a sharp fall in net profit and revenue slip, Nuvama Institutional Equities and ICICI Securities maintained 'Buy' ratings, citing strong order backlog, O&M portfolio, attractive valuation, and potential value creation from future growth opportunities.

Reports of upcoming ₹2,500 crore Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) for capital expenditure and growth plans, and to meet SEBI's minimum public shareholding norms. Share price jumped to an all-time high.
